message:
🐛 Refactor custom-dashboard.spec.ts to use canonical setup helpers (#11160)

Replaces setupDemoMode with setupDemoAndNavigate to ensure tests properly navigate to the dashboard. Removes redundant comments about what the setup helper does and adds proper type annotations.

This addresses the issue where the test was hand-rolling demo-mode setup instead of using the canonical helpers from helpers/setup.ts.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
